description: Informal note from Umm Ḥasan bt. al-Shofeṭ (or at least written in her name) to a certain judge. She asks for her share of the money raised for the Jerusalemites. She is staying with Abū l-Faraj. See Med Soc. II, p. 427, sections 135–36 for the significance of "my share with the Jerusalemites." Information from Goitein's note card.
description_he: פתק לא רשמי מאם חסן בת השופט לשופט מסוים; מבקשת את חלקה בכסף שנגבה לאנשי ירושלים; שוהה אצל אבו אל-פרג'
